name: Fast Pilaf
recipeIngredient: 2 cups quick brown rice (or quinoa, or couscous)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions and garlic in olive oil until tender.
2. Add tomatoes and beans to the pan; stir well.
3. Pour in water and grain mixture.
4. Season with herbs and spices of your choice.
5. Cook until the grain is fully cooked.
6. Serve with tossed salad.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE (I would cut back on the beans to make it count as 1 starch/bread) (I also would use a combination of couscous & quinoa and even add any free vegetables. This would be great to make ahead and take to work in the summer time.)
